---
title: "plot genotype, phenotype data for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

## evolving sociality data
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
dataset_name <- "fluc_env"

analysis_root <- "../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/1_26_fluctuating_env"
data_root     <- "../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/data"

base_data_folders <- file.path(data_root, dataset_name)
r_data_folder    <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure", "r_data", dataset_name)

dir.create(r_data_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

# load SUMMARY STATS data
```{r}
# ---- Helper: choose the generation key column name ----
.gen_key <- function(d) {
  if ("tick" %in% names(d)) return("tick")
  if ("generation" %in% names(d)) return("generation")
  names(d)[1]
}

# ---- Helper: extract metadata from filename ----
extract_metadata <- function(path) {
  rx <- "n_(\\d+)_psi_(-?[0-9.]+)_sz_(-?\\d+)_reg_(fit|ext|ave)_gap_(\\d+)_(\\d+)\\.tsv$"
  p  <- regmatches(basename(path), regexec(rx, basename(path)))[[1]]

  if (length(p) != 7) {
    stop("Could not extract metadata from file: ", basename(path))
  }

  data.frame(
    n          = as.integer(p[2]),
    psi        = as.numeric(p[3]),
    shift_size = as.integer(p[4]),
    reg        = p[5],
    gap        = as.integer(p[6]),
    rep        = as.integer(p[7]),
    file_id    = basename(path),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# ---- Helper: read one data file and attach metadata ----
read_one_data_file <- function(file) {
  df <- tryCatch(
    read.table(file, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(df)) {
    warning("Failed to read: ", file)
    return(NULL)
  }

  meta <- extract_metadata(file)

  df$n          <- meta$n
  df$psi        <- meta$psi
  df$shift_size <- meta$shift_size
  df$reg        <- meta$reg
  df$gap        <- meta$gap
  df$rep        <- meta$rep
  df$file_id    <- meta$file_id

  df
}

# ---- Helper: filter files by metadata ----
file_matches_filters <- function(file, psi_values, regimes, reps, group_sizes, gap_values) {
  meta <- tryCatch(extract_metadata(file), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(meta)) return(FALSE)

  (length(psi_values) == 0 || meta$psi %in% psi_values) &&
    (length(regimes) == 0 || meta$reg %in% regimes) &&
    (length(reps) == 0 || meta$rep %in% reps) &&
    (length(group_sizes) == 0 || meta$n %in% group_sizes) &&
    (length(gap_values) == 0 || meta$gap %in% gap_values)

}

# ---- Helper: load one data type folder ----
load_data_type <- function(data_type,
                           base_data_folder,
                           psi_values = c(),
                           regimes = c(),
                           reps = c(),
                           group_sizes = c(),
                           gap_values = c()) {
  
  folder <- file.path(base_data_folder, data_type)

  if (!dir.exists(folder)) {
    warning("Folder does not exist: ", folder)
    return(NULL)
  }

  file_list <- list.files(
    path = folder,
    pattern = "\\.tsv$",
    full.names = TRUE,
    recursive = TRUE
  )

  file_list <- Filter(
    function(file) file_matches_filters(file, psi_values, regimes, reps, group_sizes, gap_values),
    file_list
  )

  if (length(file_list) == 0) {
    warning("No matching files found in: ", folder)
    return(NULL)
  }

  df_list <- lapply(file_list, read_one_data_file)
  df_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), df_list)

  if (length(df_list) == 0) {
    warning("No readable files found in: ", folder)
    return(NULL)
  }

  df <- do.call(rbind, df_list)
  df <- df[, sort(names(df)), drop = FALSE]

  df
}
```

```{r}
data_type_to_load <- c("data")
psi_values <- c()
regimes <- c()
reps <- 1:20
group_sizes <- c()
gap_values <- c()

for (data_type in data_type_to_load) {
  cat("Loading data type:", data_type, "\n")

  df <- load_data_type(
    data_type = data_type,
    base_data_folder = base_data_folders,
    psi_values = psi_values,
    regimes = regimes,
    reps = reps,
    group_sizes = group_sizes,
    gap_values = gap_values
  )

  if (is.null(df)) {
    cat("Skipping data type:", data_type, "\n")
    next
  }

  out_file <- switch(
    data_type,
    "data"       = file.path(r_data_folder, "data_summary.rds"),
    "genotype"   = file.path(r_data_folder, "genotype.rds"),
    "phenotype"  = file.path(r_data_folder, "phenotype.rds"),
    "fitness"    = file.path(r_data_folder, "fitness.rds"),
    "allele"     = file.path(r_data_folder, "allele.rds"),
    "copied_val" = file.path(r_data_folder, "copied_val.rds"),
    "group_tag" = file.path(r_data_folder, "group_tag.rds"),
    file.path(r_data_folder, paste0(data_type, ".rds"))
  )

  saveRDS(df, file = out_file)

  cat("Saved to:", out_file, "\n")
  cat("Done loading data type:", data_type, "\n")
}

```
